page.title: Super Bowl Yacht Charter in Marbella: A Luxury Viewing Party at Sea

data.meta_description: Book a Super Bowl yacht charter in Marbella for the ultimate luxury viewing party at sea. Watch the game from Puerto Banús on a private boat with drinks & snacks included.
data.summary: Celebrate the Super Bowl in style with a private yacht charter in Marbella, departing from Puerto Banús. Watch the game on board with a crew, drinks, and snacks included, from €749 for two hours.
key_facts: All charters include a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, and Spanish IVA (21%).
Super Bowl viewing parties available on boats from 6.4m to 29m, accommodating 5–12 guests.
Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) from €749 for 2 hours or €2,299 for 8 hours.
Tier B Mangusta 80 boats from €4,719 for 4 hours, with a jet ski included free.
All charters include water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks.
Puerto Banús is the departure point for all boats, with easy access to Marbella Marina.
Customise your trip with optional catering, decorations, or a larger screen upon request.
Contact us via WhatsApp for pricing on other boats and bespoke Super Bowl packages.

faq.q: Can I watch the Super Bowl live on a yacht charter in Marbella?
faq.a: Yes, we can arrange a live stream on board via satellite or mobile data. Let us know your needs when booking, and we’ll ensure a screen is set up. Most yachts have onboard entertainment systems, and we can bring a portable projector for larger groups.

faq.q: What is the cost of a Super Bowl yacht charter in Marbella?
faq.a: Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours or €2,299 for 8 hours, including skipper, drinks, snacks, and VAT. Tier B Mangusta 80 yachts are €4,719 for a minimum 4 hours, with a free jet ski. Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp.

faq.q: How many guests can I bring on a Super Bowl yacht charter?
faq.a: Capacity ranges from 5 guests on the Dubhe or Mariah SX21 up to 12 guests on larger yachts like the Ferretti 94, Mangusta 80, or Canados 86. Check individual boat specs for exact numbers.

faq.q: What is included in the Super Bowl yacht charter package?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). You can add catering or decorations for a fee.

faq.q: Where do the Super Bowl yacht charters depart from?
faq.a: All our boats depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella. You can board at the marina and set sail along the coast. The location is ideal for a pre-game cruise or anchoring near the Golden Mile.

faq.q: Can I customise the Super Bowl experience on board?
faq.a: Absolutely. We offer optional extras such as bespoke catering (e.g., American-style game-day food), themed decorations, and additional audio-visual equipment. Contact us via WhatsApp to discuss your requirements.

faq.q: Is the Super Bowl yacht charter suitable for a corporate event?
faq.a: Yes, many companies book our yachts for client entertainment or team celebrations. With private spaces, a professional crew, and full catering options, it’s an excellent venue for networking or reward events.

faq.q: What happens if the weather is bad on Super Bowl day?
faq.a: We monitor forecasts closely. If conditions are unsafe, we can reschedule or offer a full refund. The yacht has a sheltered cabin, so you can still enjoy the game even if it’s chilly or breezy.

data.body_html:
Forget crowded sports bars and overpriced stadium seats. This year, watch the Super Bowl from the deck of a private yacht in Marbella, with the Mediterranean as your backdrop. A [Super Bowl yacht charter in Marbella](/blog/marbella-yacht-charter-super-bowl/) combines the thrill of the game with the luxury of a private boat, complete with drinks, snacks, and a dedicated crew. Whether you’re a die-hard fan or just here for the halftime show, this is the ultimate way to celebrate.

Why Choose a Super Bowl Yacht Charter in Marbella?

Marbella offers a unique setting for the Super Bowl: mild February temperatures (around 15–18°C), stunning coastal views, and the glamour of Puerto Banús. On a private yacht, you control the experience — choose your own playlist, order your favourite food, and watch the game without queues or noise. It’s an intimate party for up to 12 guests, with no strangers and no distractions. Plus, you can anchor off the Golden Mile or cruise along the coast before kick-off.

Our Fleet for the Big Game

We have a range of boats to suit different group sizes and budgets. All depart from Puerto Banús and include a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, and VAT. Here are the best options for your Super Bowl party:

Affordable Luxury: Tier A Boats

For smaller groups, the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) and Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) are perfect. Both cost €749 for 2 hours or €2,299 for 8 hours, including drinks and snacks. You can book a 4-hour slot to watch the game and still have time for a sunset cruise.

Premium Experience: Tier B Mangusta 80

If you want to go big, the Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) — available in grey and white variants — offers a spacious flybridge, a large saloon, and a free jet ski. The minimum booking is 4 hours at €4,719, ideal for a full Super Bowl party with room to dance or lounge.

Other Boats (Pricing on Request)

We also have the Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax), Canados 86 (26m, 12 pax), Maiora 26m (26m, 12 pax), and many more. Contact us via WhatsApp for a custom quote — we can arrange extra screens, catering, or decorations.

What’s Included in Your Charter

Every booking comes with:
• Licensed skipper
• Fuel (unlimited cruising within reason)
• Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava
• Light snacks (crisps, nuts, olives)
• Insurance and safety equipment
• Spanish IVA (21%)
You can bring your own food or order catering (extra cost).

How to Watch the Super Bowl on a Yacht

We can set up a tablet, laptop, or portable projector in the cabin or on deck. Most yachts have Wi-Fi or you can use mobile data (check coverage). For a truly immersive experience, we recommend booking the Ferretti 94 or Mangusta 80 — they have large saloons with comfortable seating and good acoustics. Let us know your screen size preference when booking.

Sample Itinerary for Super Bowl Day

Here’s a suggested timeline for a 6-hour charter:
16:00 – Board at Puerto Banús. Welcome drink and safety briefing.
16:30 – Cruise along the coast towards Cabopino or Cala del Faro.
18:00 – Anchor for sunset. Snacks and drinks served.
19:30 – Return to port or stay at anchor for the game (kick-off around 00:30 CET).
00:30 – Super Bowl starts. Watch on board with your group.
02:00 – Post-game celebration or cruise back to port.
Adjust as needed — we’re flexible.

Book Your Super Bowl Yacht Charter in Marbella

Ready to secure your spot? The Super Bowl is one of the most popular dates for yacht charters in Marbella, so early booking is recommended. Visit our [homepage](/) to browse all available boats, or contact us directly via WhatsApp for personalised advice. We’ll help you choose the perfect vessel and arrange any extras. Don’t miss the chance to watch the game in style — on the water, with the people who matter.

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I watch the Super Bowl live on a yacht charter in Marbella?

Yes, we can arrange a live stream on board via satellite or mobile data. Let us know your needs when booking, and we’ll ensure a screen is set up. Most yachts have onboard entertainment systems, and we can bring a portable projector for larger groups.

What is the cost of a Super Bowl yacht charter in Marbella?

Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours or €2,299 for 8 hours, including skipper, drinks, snacks, and VAT. Tier B Mangusta 80 yachts are €4,719 for a minimum 4 hours, with a free jet ski. Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp.

How many guests can I bring on a Super Bowl yacht charter?

Capacity ranges from 5 guests on the Dubhe or Mariah SX21 up to 12 guests on larger yachts like the Ferretti 94, Mangusta 80, or Canados 86. Check individual boat specs for exact numbers.

What is included in the Super Bowl yacht charter package?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). You can add catering or decorations for a fee.

Where do the Super Bowl yacht charters depart from?

All our boats depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella. You can board at the marina and set sail along the coast. The location is ideal for a pre-game cruise or anchoring near the Golden Mile.

Can I customise the Super Bowl experience on board?

Absolutely. We offer optional extras such as bespoke catering (e.g., American-style game-day food), themed decorations, and additional audio-visual equipment. Contact us via WhatsApp to discuss your requirements.

Is the Super Bowl yacht charter suitable for a corporate event?

Yes, many companies book our yachts for client entertainment or team celebrations. With private spaces, a professional crew, and full catering options, it’s an excellent venue for networking or reward events.

What happens if the weather is bad on Super Bowl day?

We monitor forecasts closely. If conditions are unsafe, we can reschedule or offer a full refund. The yacht has a sheltered cabin, so you can still enjoy the game even if it’s chilly or breezy.
